{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173638669028AC51DD31AAE6D3"}"},"total":46},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617442678360621886","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"行事逻辑，关系递进都还挺真实的。主角一步步加入阵营，收获大家的信任，地图更替也很流畅，一不留神都要到白鲸篇章了。继续冲啊作者，好看爱看，求多更[求爆更]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773576651,"group_id":"7588485287378963481","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzlgN+IfnKuOeIadF06bpcw=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529650&x-signature=hnlAaND2JahZJ5YIbXdCK72Bw34%3D","user_id":"883633878475748","user_name":"喜欢棕榈猫的云鬣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"883633878475748","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588485287378963481","book_info":{"abstract":"【主角是佩恩+Re0同人+无敌+无486】
有一个坏消息和一个好消息。
坏消息：穿越到《从零开始的异世界生活》，这个挂壁满地的世界。
好消息：我是天道佩恩。
佩恩：“让这个世界感受痛苦，等等，好像也不是很痛苦。”
抓白鲸和大兔成通灵兽，抓肠姐成为恶鬼道，魔兽使梅莉成为萝莉道。
佩恩：“虽然你们的加护很厉害，但我的轮回眼也未尝不利。”
